betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Here, in this place of Worthiness, I am reminded of the Furnace dimension. 
A world I had to abandon. Its call was too strong, too templing. Its allure too prepotent.
As I am, I cannot face its beauty, its might, its power. I had to take a step back.
Well, here is someone who did not step back.
From the start, my journey into the Furnace dimension was one of pursuit in someone else's steps. Well that someone is here, now, in Gallifrey.
A Testificate, one who could embrace the power of furnaces, making it their own, while resisting their deathly call.
One who delved where none had delved before. One who succeeded where I could not.
The true Master of Furnaces. The guardian of the Fractallite Furnace. The smeltest among smelters.
